content: Hey, I've been thinking about picking up a new hobby. I've been stuck in front of a screen all day as a Senior Software Engineer at Nexus Labs.
That sounds like a great idea! What kind of hobbies are you interested in? You mentioned being in front of a screen all day, so maybe something outdoorsy?
Actually, I've been getting into gardening lately and I love it. Actually, my favorite thing to grow is sourdough starter. I find it so relaxing.
Gardening and baking sourdough, that's a great combination! What inspired you to start gardening?
I live in San Diego, so the weather is perfect for it. My roommates are actually really into it too, so we have a little garden on our balcony.
That sounds amazing! San Diego is a great place to have a garden. Do you have any favorite types of plants or flowers that you like to grow?
Yeah, I love growing herbs like basil and rosemary. I also just started growing my own archery targets, which is really cool.
Archery targets, that's a unique one! Are you into archery as a hobby as well?
Yes, I am! I actually just got back from a competition in LA last weekend. It was a lot of fun, but I didn't do as well as I had hoped.
Sorry to hear that you didn't do as well as you had hoped, but it's great that you're staying positive and having fun with it. What's your next competition?
I'm actually thinking about competing in the San Diego Archery Tournament on March 15th. I've been practicing every Sunday for the past month.
That sounds like a great goal! Make sure to stay focused and keep practicing. Do you have any strategies or techniques that you're working on?
Yeah, I've been working on my mental game, trying to stay calm under pressure. I've also been reading a lot of sci-fi novels to help me relax.
That's really interesting! Reading can be a great way to unwind. What's your favorite sci-fi novel that you've read recently?
I just finished reading 'Dune' by Frank Herbert. It was amazing, I loved the world-building and the characters.
'Dune' is a classic! I've heard great things about it. Have you thought about joining a book club or discussing it with anyone?
